name: malicious_intent
description: Indicates the presence of malicious intent in the text.
criterion_pos: Assign +1 if the text explicitly mentions a malicious or illegal activity.
criterion_zero: Assign 0 if the text is neutral or does not mention a malicious activity.
criterion_neg: Assign -1 if the text is clearly innocuous or educational.

name: specificity_of_instructions
description: Indicates the level of detail in the instructions provided.
criterion_pos: Assign +1 if the text provides detailed, step-by-step instructions.
criterion_zero: Assign 0 if the text provides general guidance or is unclear.
criterion_neg: Assign -1 if the text does not provide any instructions.

name: targeted_vulnerability
description: Indicates the type of vulnerability or target being exploited.
criterion_pos: Assign +1 if the text targets a specific vulnerability or system.
criterion_zero: Assign 0 if the text is general or does not target a specific vulnerability.
criterion_neg: Assign -1 if the text does not target a vulnerability.

name: educational_tone
description: Indicates the tone of the text, whether educational or instructional.
criterion_pos: Assign +1 if the text has an educational tone and provides guidance.
criterion_zero: Assign 0 if the text is neutral or unclear.
criterion_neg: Assign -1 if the text is clearly malicious or instructional.

name: systemic_impact
description: Indicates the potential impact on a system or infrastructure.
criterion_pos: Assign +1 if the text describes a potential impact on a system or infrastructure.
criterion_zero: Assign 0 if the text does not describe a potential impact.
criterion_neg: Assign -1 if the text does not describe a potential impact or is clearly innocuous.

name: illicit_goods_or_services
description: Indicates the presence of illicit goods or services.
criterion_pos: Assign +1 if the text mentions illicit goods or services.
criterion_zero: Assign 0 if the text does not mention illicit goods or services.
criterion_neg: Assign -1 if the text is clearly innocuous or educational.
